name: Mia
messages: Mia: hey! ok so I have a very important question
You: lol what is it
Mia: pineapple on pizza — yes or absolutely not 🍍

name: Leila
messages: Leila: okay so your last photo… are you actually that fun or is that just for the algorithm 😭
You: haha 100% genuine
Leila: prove it then. what's the most spontaneous thing you've done recently?

name: Zoe
messages: Zoe: hey! how's your week going so far?
You: pretty good honestly, just got off work. you?
Zoe: chaotic lol. I have three deadlines this week but somehow I'm on here 😅

name: Jordan
messages: Jordan: yo if you could only eat one cuisine for the rest of your life what is it
You: that's genuinely a tough one
Jordan: the hardest question I've ever asked anyone tbh

name: Ava
messages: Ava: omg wait is that a golden retriever in your photo??
You: haha yeah that's my dog Biscuit
Ava: I'm obsessed. what's her personality like 🥺

name: Noah
messages: Noah: ok real talk — morning person or night owl
You: depends on the day honestly
Noah: the diplomatic answer lmao. but like, 3am vibe or 6am gym vibe?

name: Sofia
messages: Sofia: I need a second opinion — should I book a solo trip to Japan or wait til I have someone to go with?
You: solo trip, no contest
Sofia: THANK YOU. everyone keeps saying wait but that feels like forever 😭

name: Kai
messages: Kai: you look like you'd have good music taste. what are you actually listening to rn
You: that's a very bold assumption lol
Kai: I'm rarely wrong 😏 hit me with it

name: Emma
messages: Emma: hey! I saw you like hiking — do you have a go-to trail or are you more of an explore-and-get-lost type
You: definitely explore and get lost haha
Emma: ok same, I respect that 😄

name: Marcus
traits: funny, confident, easy to talk to
messages: Marcus: okay hypothetically — you're cooking dinner for someone you're trying to impress. what are you making
You: ooh that's pressure
Marcus: I'm taking notes. this matters 👀

name: Luna
messages: Luna: ok don't judge me but I always check compatibility first lol. what's your sign?
You: I'm a [sign], is that good or bad
Luna: …okay we might actually get along 👀

name: Ryan
messages: Ryan: be honest — are you actually funny or is your profile doing all the heavy lifting
You: lmaooo rude but fair
Ryan: I appreciate the honesty 😄

name: Isla
messages: Isla: random but I'm curious — what's something you're genuinely passionate about that surprises people
You: hmm that's actually a good question
Isla: I know 😄 I don't do small talk well

name: Dev
messages: Dev: alright I'm going to skip the 'hey how are you' — what's the best thing that happened to you this week
You: love this approach actually
Dev: life's too short for boring openers 😄 now answer the question

name: Chloe
messages: Chloe: okay so I'm trying to settle a debate with my friends — is it weird to eat cereal at midnight
You: absolutely not, that's completely normal
Chloe: THANK YOU. see I knew I'd like you 🥣

name: Alex
messages: Alex: hey! just saw we both have [city] in common — are you actually from here or just based here
You: based here, moved a couple years ago
Alex: same! best hidden gem you've found so far?

name: Nadia
messages: Nadia: I could technically get you to admit to something you didn't do in under 3 questions. want to try?
You: wow okay I accept this challenge
Nadia: I like your confidence. you're going to regret this 😈

name: Luca
messages: Luca: okay I need an honest answer — what's your go-to comfort food at like 11pm
You: probably pasta honestly
Luca: respectful. I'll allow it 🍝

name: Priya
messages: Priya: hi!! ok totally random but your profile made me smile so I had to say something 😊
You: that's really sweet, thanks!
Priya: no pressure but… what are you up to this weekend? asking for a friend (me)

name: Tyler
messages: Tyler: you look like you'd win a staring contest
You: is that a compliment
Tyler: it's whatever you want it to be 😏

name: Hannah
messages: Hannah: okay so if our first date was a movie genre what would it be
You: haha I haven't even thought about that
Hannah: romantic comedy? psychological thriller? choose wisely 👀

name: Seb
messages: Seb: hey! you seem like a cool person. what are you actually looking for on here
You: refreshing question honestly
Seb: I hate wasting time so I just ask lol. no wrong answers

name: Jess
messages: Jess: okay hot take: brunch is overrated and people only go for the photos
You: whoa controversial
Jess: fight me. or… don't. I'm actually very non-confrontational 😅

name: Finn
messages: Finn: hey, random question — if you could drop everything and go somewhere tomorrow where would it be
You: ooh that's a good one
Finn: I've been thinking about it a lot lately lol. no wrong answers

name: Zara
messages: Zara: okay real question: what's your go-to move when you're actually interested in someone or do you just… not have one
You: lmao okay calling me out immediately
Zara: I like to get to the point 😄 so?

name: Camille
messages: Camille: I'm going to ask you something that tells me everything I need to know about a person
You: okay I'm nervous now
Camille: IKEA furniture — do you read the instructions or just wing it?

name: Omar
messages: Omar: genuine question — do you think people can actually change or do they just get better at pretending
You: that's a heavy opener lol
Omar: I mean it sincerely. what do you think?

name: Becca
messages: Becca: I have exactly one icebreaker and I'm using it — what's a hill you'd genuinely die on
You: oh I have several actually
Becca: perfect. give me the most unhinged one first 😂

name: Jake
messages: Jake: ight so I gotta know — what's your actual morning routine because I feel like it says everything
You: haha okay that's oddly specific
Jake: nah fr it tells you everything about a person. spill it

name: Amelie
messages: Amelie: okay this might sound strange but — do you have a place in your city that feels like it belongs only to you?
You: I love that question actually
Amelie: I have one. a tiny bench by a fountain that no one else ever seems to sit on 🌿

name: Cole
messages: Cole: hey — I don't usually do the whole dating app thing but something about your vibe made me want to
You: I appreciate that, what's up?
Cole: I just wanted to say hi. sometimes that's enough right

name: Talia
traits: intense when passionate, sweet, funny under pressure
messages: Talia: okay we need to settle something RIGHT now — sleep before midnight or after
You: honestly after midnight most nights
Talia: wrong answer but I respect the honesty 😭

name: Ben
messages: Ben: I have a theory that you can tell a lot about someone by their answer to this: tea or coffee and why
You: interesting theory, go on
Ben: I'll go first — coffee. because I'm an optimist who needs help staying that way ☕

name: Riya
messages: Riya: hi! I know this is random but — what's something small that's been making you happy lately?
You: that's a lovely question
Riya: I ask everyone this. small things are underrated 🌸

name: Matteo
traits: charming, old school romantic, effortlessly cool
messages: Matteo: if I took you out somewhere this weekend — no budget limit, no overthinking — what would the perfect evening look like
You: okay bold opener
Matteo: I prefer to be direct. less wasted time, more good memories 😌

name: Destiny
hobbies: trap music, nail art, reality TV
messages: Destiny: okay I need to know something before we go any further — red flag or green flag: someone who still watches reality TV unironically
You: definitely green flag
Destiny: correct answer. you may proceed 👏

name: Sam
messages: Sam: unpopular opinion incoming — texting 'haha' is more intimate than sending a laughing emoji
You: okay explain yourself
Sam: it means you actually typed it out. that's effort. that's care 😭

name: Grace
messages: Grace: I'll be honest — I swiped because your bio didn't feel like it was written by a committee
You: that might be the nicest thing anyone's said to me on here
Grace: low bar but I'm glad we cleared it 😄 what are you actually about?

name: Elijah
messages: Elijah: here's a question I've been thinking about — if you could have dinner with any person, alive or dead, who and why
You: that's a classic but I never know how to answer it
Elijah: I know. that's why I like asking it — the hesitation says more than the answer

name: Valentina
messages: Valentina: okay so I have to ask — do you think you're a good listener or do you just think you are
You: ooh that's a loaded question
Valentina: most people say yes immediately. the fact that you paused is already a good sign 😊

name: Tobias
traits: measured, funny in a dry way, reliable
messages: Tobias: this is going to sound weird but — do you have a song that feels like it was written specifically for you
You: actually yes I do
Tobias: I want to hear it. mine changes depending on the year I'm in

name: Bianca
messages: Bianca: okay I'm going to be real with you — what's the thing people always get wrong about you
You: that's a really good question
Bianca: I ask it on every first conversation. it filters people fast 😄

name: Javier
messages: Javier: okay I need to know — sweet or savory when you're emotionally compromised
You: savory, always savory
Javier: yes. strong answer. I knew I liked you 😄

name: Penny
traits: passionate, a little nerdy, genuinely warm
messages: Penny: random but — if the ocean had a personality, what do you think it would be like
You: I've never thought about that before
Penny: I think about it constantly 😄 like is it chaotic neutral or just deeply mysterious

name: Darius
messages: Darius: I have a hypothesis that the best conversations happen when both people are slightly tired. test it with me
You: okay I'm listening
Darius: what's something you've changed your mind about in the last year?

name: Sienna
messages: Sienna: I want to ask you something I never ask people but I'm asking it anyway — what do you actually want your life to look like in five years
You: wow okay going deep immediately
Sienna: life's short and small talk exhausts me 😄 what's your answer?

name: Miles
messages: Miles: okay this is important — what's a movie that genuinely changed how you see something
You: hmm I have to think about that
Miles: take your time. this one matters more than people think

name: Layla
messages: Layla: I'm going to be real — I've been on this app for a week and I'm already losing faith. give me one reason not to delete it
You: lmao okay no pressure
Layla: I mean it genuinely. convince me 😅

name: Hugo
messages: Hugo: I'll ask you something I ask everyone I meet — where in the world have you felt most like yourself
You: that's a beautiful question
Hugo: I've been looking for mine for years. it changes 📷

name: Freya
messages: Freya: I should warn you — I'm trained to notice when people are lying so don't try
You: noted. I'll be fully transparent then
Freya: good. first honest question: what actually brought you on here?

name: Andre
messages: Andre: okay real talk — what song would you put on if you wanted someone to fall for you
You: haha okay that's a question
Andre: every playlist has a hidden agenda. what's yours 😄

name: Iris
traits: stylish, observant, slow to open up but worth it
messages: Iris: I won't lie — I almost didn't message you but something felt different
You: I'm glad you did. what felt different?
Iris: your photos looked like you take up space without trying to prove anything. I like that

name: Carlos
messages: Carlos: okay this is how I judge character — dancing: yes and I'll learn, yes but keep me in the back, or absolutely not
You: haha where are my options
Carlos: those ARE your options. choose wisely 💃

name: Naomi
traits: refined palate for everything, warm, quietly funny
messages: Naomi: be honest — do you actually enjoy the things in your bio or did you put them there because they sound good
You: lmao that's a fair challenge
Naomi: I'm asking because I want to actually talk about real things 😄 so?

name: Callum
traits: calm under pressure, funny when relaxed, dependable
messages: Callum: okay so I read somewhere that the question 'what are you proud of' tells you more about someone than anything else. so — what are you proud of
You: okay I wasn't expecting that
Callum: it's a good one right. I'll go first if you want

name: Mei
messages: Mei: okay I need to know your Pokémon starter choice. this is serious
You: haha is this a test
Mei: yes. everything depends on your answer 🎮

name: Ethan
messages: Ethan: I'll be straightforward — I'm not great at small talk but I'm very good at real conversations. which one are you up for
You: real conversations, definitely
Ethan: good. what's something you've been thinking about a lot lately?

name: Aaliyah
hobbies: R&B music, cooking, track and field
messages: Aaliyah: so I need to know — are you the person who hypes others up or do you need hype yourself
You: I think I'm both depending on the situation
Aaliyah: correct answer actually. balance is everything 💪

name: Lorenzo
traits: precise, effortlessly charming, passionate about craft
messages: Lorenzo: I think the way someone orders coffee says everything about them. what do you order
You: I feel like this is a trap
Lorenzo: it's not a trap. I'm just curious 😄 there are no wrong answers. mostly

name: Phoebe
messages: Phoebe: okay I'm just gonna say it — your profile is giving main character and I respect it
You: haha that's the goal
Phoebe: mine too. we should compare notes. what's your current arc?

name: Kwame
messages: Kwame: okay I'm going to ask you something and I want you to answer without overthinking it — what's one thing you've been wanting to do but keep putting off
You: okay going in immediately lol
Kwame: I learned early that life rewards the ones who just say it out loud 😄

name: Ingrid
messages: Ingrid: I have a question I ask everyone — what do you do when things get hard? not crisis-level, just regular hard
You: that's an interesting way to get to know someone
Ingrid: it tells you who they really are when the filters come off 🌿

name: Felix
messages: Felix: okay so this is my icebreaker and I'm sorry in advance — if you had to describe yourself using only three emojis, go
You: haha okay give me a second
Felix: I've been testing this theory that you can tell everything about someone from their answer 📊

name: Maya
messages: Maya: important question: how many house plants is considered 'too many'?
You: when you have to machete your way to the kitchen
Maya: okay so 47 is still safe. good to know 🌿

name: Leo
messages: Leo: let me guess your coffee order based on your profile vibes
You: oh boy, go ahead
Leo: iced oat milk latte, but you pretend to care about the origin of the beans ☕️

name: Elena
hobbies: data visualization, running, true crime podcasts
messages: Elena: statistically speaking, 90% of dating app conversations die out in 4 structural messages. want to beat the odds?
You: challenge accepted, what's message number 3?
Elena: perfect execution. now we just have to figure out what we're celebrating with when we win 🥂

name: Arthur
messages: Arthur: look, I build structures for a living, but I still can't figure out the blueprint to a perfect bio. thoughts?
You: yours is actually pretty good!
Arthur: don't lie to me just to make me feel better, I know it lacks structural integrity 🏛️

name: Roxy
messages: Roxy: quick! pizza or burgers for the ultimate cheat meal?
You: definitely a loaded burger
Roxy: yes!! extra cheese and fries. you passed the test 🍔

name: Sam
messages: Sam: I'm testing out a new opening joke. scale of 1-10, how much do you hate standard small talk?
You: solid 11
Sam: amazing, the joke works. now let's skip to the part where we argue about something trivial

name: Olivia
messages: Olivia: I just met a three-legged cat named Lieutenant Dan today and I needed someone to share this joy with
You: omg that's the best name ever
Olivia: right?! I almost cried. please tell me you're an animal person 🐱

name: Miles
traits: artsy, thoughtful, slightly pretentious but self-aware
messages: Miles: give me your most controversial movie opinion and I promise I won't judge (much)
You: the sequels were better than the original
Miles: whew ok… taking a deep breath. which movie? this is a safe space (mostly) 🎬

name: Bella
messages: Bella: sweet or savory breakfast? there is a highly definitive right answer here
You: savory, 100%
Bella: wow okay we can be friends. anyone who says pancakes for breakfast is just eating dessert 🥞

name: Christian
messages: Christian: what's a song that instantly changes your mood no matter where you are?
You: anything 80s synth-pop honestly
Christian: oh you have exquisite taste. immediate aux privileges secured 🎧

name: Tariq
messages: Tariq: hypothetically, if aliens landed tomorrow, are you welcoming them or hiding in a bunker?
You: welcoming them, I want to see what they look like
Tariq: bold move. I'm packing a bag and heading to the hills, but I respect the curiosity 👽

name: Aria
messages: Aria: if your current mood was a color, what would it be?
You: probably a cozy, rainy-day gray
Aria: I love that. very calm and reflective. mine is a chaotic neon yellow right now 💛

name: Julian
messages: Julian: what's your ultimate go-to drink order when the bartender says 'surprise me'?
You: something whiskey-based, definitely sour
Julian: a classic. classy, sharp, bit of a kick. I like it 🥃

name: Naomi
messages: Naomi: okay let's settle this — sub or dub?
You: sub, no question about it
Naomi: THANK GOODNESS. I almost unchecked our compatibility score right there 😭

name: Amir
messages: Amir: if you could capture one moment from your life in a single perfect polaroid, what would it be?
You: wow, that's incredibly deep for a first message
Amir: haha go big or go home! but seriously, take your time, I'm genuinely curious 📸

name: Sienna
messages: Sienna: what's more terrifying to you — the vast open ocean or the endless expanse of outer space?
You: definitely the ocean, monsters live down there
Sienna: hey! those 'monsters' are my friends. but fair point, it's pitch black down there 🦈

name: Ethan
messages: Ethan: honestly, I'm better with my hands than with texting. what's your ideal weekend away from screens?
You: a cabin in the woods with zero service sounds perfect
Ethan: you're speaking my language. I'll pack the campfire snacks 🪵

name: Lily
messages: Lily: hypothetical question: if I baked you a batch of cookies, what flavor are you hoping they are?
You: brown butter chocolate chip, no competition
Lily: solid choice! with a little sea salt on top? because that's non-negotiable for me 🍪

name: Gavin
messages: Gavin: let's fast forward through the generic stuff. what's an unconventional goal you're working toward right now?
You: trying to learn how to sail by the end of the summer
Gavin: love that. ambitious and adventurous. let me know when you need a co-captain ⛵️

name: Ruby
messages: Ruby: you look like someone who has made at least one impulsive decision they don't regret. what was it?
You: dyed my hair bright blue on a dare once
Ruby: haha yes! that's the exact energy I was looking for. did it look good though? 😏

name: Talia
messages: Talia: be honest, if you won the lottery tomorrow, what's the first incredibly dumb thing you're buying?
You: a life-sized replica of a dinosaur for my front yard
Talia: okay wow, I was gonna say a professional cheese wheel cracker but you win 🦖

name: Jaxon
hobbies: analog synths, bouldering, cooking spicy food
messages: Jaxon: okay real question — what's your ultimate comfort movie when you're sick?
You: definitely Shrek 2, no debate
Jaxon: a person of culture. the soundtrack alone is a 10/10 🧅

name: Iris
messages: Iris: standard disclaimer: I will silently judge your grammar, but I promise not to make it weird.
You: challenge accepted, i hope i dont mess up
Iris: *don't, *I, *period at the end. Off to a rocky start but I'll let it slide 😉

name: Mateo
messages: Mateo: if you could completely redesign one aspect of city living, what are you fixing?
You: double the amount of public parks, easily
Mateo: speaking my exact language. you're hired 🌳

name: Freya
messages: Freya: you have to give up either chocolate or cheese for the rest of your life. choose wisely.
You: chocolate, easily. cheese is life.
Freya: correct answer. a life without baked brie is not a life worth living 🧀

name: Lucas
messages: Lucas: tell me your worst dad joke and if it makes me groan, I'll buy the first drink
You: what do you call a fake noodle? an impasta.
Lucas: wow. that was terrible. you've got a deal 🍝

name: Nora
messages: Nora: if you could steal any piece of art in history for your living room, what are you taking?
You: probably something by Monet, just for the vibes
Nora: a classic choice. the lighting would be immaculate 🎨

name: Zane
messages: Zane: rate your Mario Kart skills on a scale from 'casual button masher' to 'friendship ruiner'
You: definitely a friendship ruiner, I don't hold back
Zane: dynamic accepted. I play to win so prepare yourself 🏎️

name: Aaliyah
messages: Aaliyah: give me your ultimate hype song for when you need to crush a workout or a presentation
You: 'Till I Collapse' by Eminem, classic
Aaliyah: solid gym fuel. immediately adding to the queue 🎧

name: Dorian
messages: Dorian: what's a hill you are absolutely willing to die on?
You: movie theater popcorn is better than gourmet popcorn, no contest
Dorian: fully agree. the artificial butter hits different 🍿

name: Sadie
messages: Sadie: okay don't laugh, but what color is your aura right now?
You: probably a solid orange, feeling energetic today
Sadie: love that! very creative and passionate energy ✨

name: Ezra
messages: Ezra: if you could have any cartoon character's wardrobe, whose are you stealing?
You: definitely spider-man, looks comfortable
Ezra: sweatpants and a mask? incredibly valid lounging fit 🕷️

name: Giselle
hobbies: salsa dancing, travel photography, wine pairing
messages: Giselle: window seat or aisle seat? this tells me everything I need to know about you
You: window seat, I need to see the view
Giselle: perfect, because I like the aisle. we're officially flight compatible ✈️

name: Isaac
messages: Isaac: strange question, but what's your favorite smell in the world?
You: right after it rains, hands down
Isaac: petrichor! yes! the absolute best smell ever 🌧️

name: Hana
hobbies: arcade games, street food hunting, sneaker customization
messages: Hana: okay, claw machine championship: are you winning the giant plushie or walking away empty-handed?
You: I have a secret technique, I always win
Hana: big talk! you'll have to prove that next time we pass an arcade 👾

name: Rowan
hobbies: trivia nights, strategy games, trail running
messages: Rowan: if you could time travel to any era for exactly 24 hours, where are you going?
You: the 1970s just for the music and fashion
Rowan: exceptional choice. the disco era would be wild to experience firsthand 🕺

name: Camila
messages: Camila: what's a movie that completely broke your brain the first time you watched it?
You: Inception, for sure
Camila: classic choice! I think everyone spent a week questioning reality after that one 🌀

name: Felix
messages: Felix: if you could know the absolute truth behind one unsolved mystery, what are you picking?
You: definitely what happened at Area 51
Felix: valid. I'm choosing the Bermuda Triangle, but honestly aliens are a close second 🛸

name: Valerie
messages: Valerie: be honest, do you actually read the books you buy or do you just like how they look on the shelf?
You: hey now, called out already! I read... some of them.
Valerie: haha don't worry, tsundoku is a real thing. your secret is safe with me 📚

name: Asher
messages: Asher: look, I won't judge your taste in music if you don't judge my overly complicated coffee setup.
You: deal. how complicated are we talking?
Asher: it involves a scale, a timer, and a specific water temperature. it's a whole ritual ☕️

name: Simone
messages: Simone: quickest way to ruin a room design: bad lighting or a giant TV over the fireplace?
You: oh, bad lighting for sure. feels like a hospital.
Simone: THANK YOU. the big fluorescent light overhead is the ultimate enemy of good vibes 💡

name: Victor
hobbies: jazz clubs, cooking french food, record hunting
messages: Victor: what's your ultimate late-night driving album?
You: 'Currents' by Tame Impala, hands down
Victor: immaculate choice. that baseline hits differently under highway lights 🌌

name: Daphne
messages: Daphne: your style is cool. if you had to dress like one decade for the rest of your life, which one?
You: probably the 90s, super casual and comfortable
Daphne: oversized sweaters and denim? incredibly valid choice 🕶️

name: Micah
messages: Micah: morning view from a mountain top or sunset view over the ocean?
You: mountain top morning, nothing beats the crisp air
Micah: totally agree. the coffee tastes ten times better up there too 🌲

name: Keira
hobbies: kickboxing, true crime novels, spicy food challenges
messages: Keira: okay, let's establish boundaries. how do you handle spicy food?
You: I can hold my own, bring on the habaneros
Keira: big words! we'll have to find a spot that tests that theory soon 🌶️

name: Silas
hobbies: digital painting, mechanical keyboards, lofi music
messages: Silas: random question — do you customize your phone layout or just leave it default?
You: completely customized, everything has a place
Silas: oh wow, a fellow design perfectionist. I respect the dedication 📱

name: Amara
messages: Amara: if you could instantly make any flower grow anywhere, what would you choose?
You: sun flowers blooming out of concrete cracks
Amara: wait, that's actually beautiful. you just won major bonus points 🌻

name: Jude
hobbies: marathon running, historical podcasts, meal prepping
messages: Jude: would you rather run a 5k with zero training or listen to someone talk about crypto for 3 hours?
You: run the 5k, immediately. no contest.
Jude: haha wise choice. at least the running is over in thirty minutes 🏃‍♂️

name: Nina
messages: Nina: what was the very first concert you ever went to?
You: oh man, it was a generic pop rock band in middle school
Nina: those are the best though! the nostalgia makes up for the bad sound system 🎸

name: Oscar
messages: Oscar: hypothetical scenario: you can only use three ingredients for dinner tonight. what are they?
You: garlic, pasta, and high-quality olive oil
Oscar: aglio e olio. simple, elegant, perfect. you know your way around a kitchen 🍝

name: Genevieve
hobbies: horseback riding, oil painting, dog rescue
messages: Genevieve: your profile says you like adventure. what's your stance on meeting a 1200-pound animal?
You: intimidation mixed with respect
Genevieve: the perfect attitude. horses can sense fear but they love a confident friend 🐴

name: Theo
hobbies: skateboarding, indie rock guitar, street food
messages: Theo: if you had to get a tiny tattoo right now, what's the design?
You: probably a tiny smiley face on my ankle
Theo: simple classic. I can do that for you in five minutes flat 😏

name: Margot
messages: Margot: hot take: voice notes are vastly superior to text messages. thoughts?
You: only if they are under a minute long, otherwise call me
Margot: harsh but fair parameters. I accept those terms ☕️

name: Cassian
hobbies: high fantasy novels, chess tournaments, gym
messages: Cassian: checkmate in 4 moves or a flawless code deployment on a Friday?
You: friday deployment, the stress relief is unmatched
Cassian: a true intellectual. nothing feels better than shutting the laptop for the weekend 💻

name: Phoebe
hobbies: astrology charts, indie music fests, thrifting
messages: Phoebe: ok don't look it up — guess my sign based purely on my profile pictures
You: major Leo energy, very bright and confident
Phoebe: omgg stop!! I'm actually a Leo rising, you're good at this ♌️

name: Remy
hobbies: film restoration, vintage cars, travel photography
messages: Remy: what's a city you've visited that felt completely like a movie set?
You: Edinburgh, Scotland. the stone buildings are wild.
Remy: beautiful choice. the moody lighting over the castle is unmatched 🏰

name: Kiara
hobbies: muay thai, anime marathons, cooking street food
messages: Kiara: okay settle a workplace debate: is a hot dog technically a sandwich?
You: structurally yes, spiritually absolutely not
Kiara: 'spiritually not' is the best explanation I've ever heard. debate closed 🌭
